objects.fact: On this machine, terminal 'git push' cannot complete (Git Credential Manager dialog fails: 'User cancelled dialog', no /dev/tty). Commit locally and push via GitHub Desktop, which is already authenticated. Applies to every repo/project on this machine.
objects.context: Machine-level fact promoted from infrapilot memory (KN-001 there). Kept in both while infrapilot PEND-004 references the local copy.

objects.fact: Claude Code agent-spawn completion notifications include measured usage: subagent_tokens, tool_uses, duration_ms. The ORION orchestrator collects these per spawn and passes them to the reflector, so metrics.json modelOutcomes carry MEASURED token costs per phase/model (measurement_mode MEASURED for spawns). The orchestrator's own inline consumption remains unmetered — never fabricate it.
objects.context: Discovered 2026-07-02 during the E2E pipeline test; upgraded ORION's Context Economy from conceptual to measured for delegated work.

objects.fact: infrapilot Supabase project: ref zrogravgwhoijajzciem, URL https://zrogravgwhoijajzciem.supabase.co. Client-safe publishable anon key (sb_publishable_ format, the new Supabase key style equivalent to legacy anon) is stored in infrapilot-app/.env.local (gitignored). Re-readable from Supabase Dashboard -> Project Settings -> API. SECURITY RULE: never request, paste into chat, or store the service_role/secret key; publishable keys are public-by-design (they ship in the browser bundle) so they are safe, secrets are not.
objects.context: Recorded at 2026-07-03 session close. Raw key intentionally kept only in .env.local, not in committed memory.
